case_title: MUTSUKO MATSUNAMI VS. CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATSUNAMI, MUTSUKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATSUNAMI, MUTSUKO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MATSUNAMI, MUTSUKO AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATSUNAMI, MUTSUKO AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MUTSUKO MATSUNAMI APPEARED. DEFENDANT CLARK PEST CONTROL, INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY TOM BROWN, WDO SERVICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
